title: Predench
body:
This small mod add two items:
- Vitriolic Feather
- Strange Writing Book

First one created this way:

![Crafting recipe](https://i.imgur.com/vBmHPEO.png)

This item is used in crafting of the second one with combination of book and glowing inksack in shapless form.
With _Strange Writing Book_ in your main hand and the object you want to enchant in your offhand you should click on Enchanting Table. This operation will cost you 3 levels, will consume _Strange Writing Book_ and give you report about enchantments for item in your offhand.

If you aren't satisfied with enchantments you can place bucket of water in your offhand, dry sponge in your main hand and click on enchantment table - your enchantments will be re-rollled.
